inputs.label: Argument (x)
inputs.businessContext: The value for which the logarithm is calculated. Must be > 0.

businessContext_i18n.en: The value for which the logarithm is calculated. Must be > 0.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Wert, für den der Logarithmus berechnet wird. Muss > 0 sein.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La valeur pour laquelle le logarithme est calculé. Doit être > 0.
businessContext_i18n.es: El valor para el cual se calcula el logaritmo. Debe ser > 0.

inputs.label: Log Base (b)
inputs.businessContext: The base of the logarithm. Common bases: 10, e (Math.E), 2. Must be > 0 and ≠ 1.

businessContext_i18n.en: The base of the logarithm. Common bases: 10, e (Math.E), 2. Must be > 0 and ≠ 1.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Logaritmanın tabanı. Yaygın tabanlar: 10, e (Math.E), 2. > 0 ve ≠ 1 olmalıdır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Basis des Logarithmus. Übliche Basen: 10, e (Math.E), 2. Muss > 0 und ≠ 1 sein.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La base du logarithme. Bases courantes : 10, e (Math.E), 2. Doit être > 0 et ≠ 1.
businessContext_i18n.es: La base del logaritmo. Bases comunes: 10, e (Math.E), 2. Debe ser > 0 y ≠ 1.

inputs.label: Multiplier (m)
inputs.businessContext: Scaling factor applied after taking the logarithm, e.g., 20 for dB conversion.

businessContext_i18n.en: Scaling factor applied after taking the logarithm, e.g., 20 for dB conversion.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Logaritma alındıktan sonra uygulanan ölçekleme faktörü, örn. dB dönüşümü için 20.
businessContext_i18n.de: Skalierungsfaktor, der nach dem Logarithmus angewendet wird, z. B. 20 für dB-Umrechnung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur d'échelle appliqué après le logarithme, par exemple 20 pour la conversion en dB.
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de escala aplicado después de tomar el logaritmo, por ejemplo, 20 para conversión a dB.

inputs.label: Offset (c)
inputs.businessContext: Constant added after multiplication, used in linear calibration or zero adjustment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Constant added after multiplication, used in linear calibration or zero adjustment.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çarpma işleminden sonra eklenen sabit, doğrusal kalibrasyon veya sıfır ayarında kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Konstante, die nach der Multiplikation addiert wird, verwendet für lineare Kalibrierung oder Nullpunktanpassung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Constante ajoutée après multiplication, utilisée dans l'étalonnage linéaire ou l'ajustement du zéro.
businessContext_i18n.es: Constante añadida después de la multiplicación, utilizada en calibración lineal o ajuste a cero.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
